A [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] tourist attraction, '''Otherworld Encounter''' provided adventure-themed [[virtual reality]] simulations that allowed tourists to "walk" on the surface of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Popular music would be played during the simulation to assure tourists that they weren't actually on Bespin's surface.
